title: Affordable, but not accessible: Karnataka’s rural transport paradox
description: Photo Credit: Deccan Herald Karnataka has improved transport affordability through subsidies and schemes, yet reliable access remains uneven in rural areas. Using insights from Melukote, this article examines how limited services, regulatory barriers, and weak last-mile connectivity continue to restrict […] The post Affordable, but not accessible: Karnataka’s rural transport paradox appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
